intro.text: Microplastic concentrations just crossed irreversible thresholds in the bay food chain. We still have a window if we act now.

options.text: I can deploy cleanup sweeps immediately.

cleanup_brief.text: Target the densest plastic clusters first. If they fragment, each fragment becomes a long-term toxin vector.

options.text: Understood. I will prioritize cluster collapse prevention.

ares_hint.text: Telemetry from autonomous skimmers shows synchronized dumping cycles. That pattern is too clean to be accidental.

options.text: I will trace command traffic while I clean the bay.

end.text: Bring the ocean back to a breathable state and species rebound will begin within weeks.
